name: Cotton-Blend Chino Trousers
description: A relaxed cotton chino — the warm-weather counterpart to the wool trousers, for days that don't call for wool.
whyThisFitsMyArchive: The wool trousers are for cooler months and formal contexts. These are for everything else — cream works with the whole neutral palette, and the cotton breathes properly in the heat.
whatItReplaces: Doesn't replace anything yet — it fills the gap the wool trousers leave once the weather turns too warm for wool to make sense.
whyIChooseThis: Over wool trousers in summer: cotton is the only realistic choice in Indian heat. Over slim chinos: the relaxed cut matches everything else I own.
whatItPairsWithInMyCollection: Cream with the linen shirt or a Supima tee. Navy under the overshirt for something slightly dressier.
layeringCombinations: Not a layering piece. Pairs with the linen shirt, Supima tee, or overshirt on top.
colourCombinations: Cream is the priority colour — it's the one missing from the current rotation. Stone and navy are lower-priority additions once cream earns its place.
bestOccasions: Smart-casual in heat, when wool isn't realistic
costPerWearReasoning: ₹6,490 for a piece that would only get real use in the hottest months, which is why it sits below the wool trousers in priority despite solving a real seasonal gap.
whatMakesItTimeless: A plain chino in a neutral colourway — nothing about the cut is tied to a season or trend.
whatProblemItSolves: Formal-enough trousers for warm weather, without wearing wool when it doesn't make sense to.
whatCouldReplaceIt: The wool trousers cover cooler months, but these are the only realistic option once the weather turns.
similarPiecesIWouldProbablyLike: Massimo Dutti Wool Trousers (same foundation role, different season).
alternativeUnder3000: Uniqlo Stretch Slim Fit Chino (~₹2,490 at uniqlo.com/in) — excellent cotton gabardine at lower price
alternativeUnder10000: COS Slim Tapered Chino (~₹5,000-₹7,000 import via cos.com)
buyRecommendation: Wait for Sale — the Uniqlo chino is genuinely comparable. Buy MD only at 40% off or more (~₹3,000-₹3,600).
